objective: Objectif de stratégie: Sur le token RNDRUSDC et le timeframe 30m, utiliser la Bollinger + Supertrend avec un SL/TP ajustables a la volatilite, un filtre anti-faux-signaisls (confirmation inverse partielle) pour les transactions hors sentiers battus. Les entrées seront basés sur des mouvements de cours et comportements aleatoires pour le mode_microstructure avec un filtre horaire de liquidite, et la préférence pour des paires d'indicateurs rarement combinées du mode_offbeat. La stratégie doit inclure une hypothese testable et falsifiable qui permette l'exploration de comportements inhabituels dans le marché crypto.

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy focuses on Bollinger Bands and Supertrend with adjustable SL/TP based on volatility, an anti-fake signal filter for offbeat trades. It uses random market microstructure movements with a liquidity filter time frame, favoring less combined rare indicators from the offbeat mode. The hypothesis states that fallback contract will be generated automatically to maintain progress when LLM is not exploitable. Recent history shows first iteration results.
[Backup plan] 1. If results are poor (negative return), we would need to adjust parameters like adjusting SL/TP based on volatility, adding a filter for fake signals or looking into different less combined rare indicators from the offbeat mode. 2. We could also consider generating fallback contract only when LLM is not exploitable and not all the time as it might lead to unwanted results in some scenarios. 3. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), we would need to look into improving our indicators like using RSI, EMA or ATR with different parameters or looking into other less combined rare indicators from the offbeat mode. 4. In case of failure, a more robust approach could be tried where we incorporate sentiment analysis, machine learning algorithms and deep learning methods for predicting future market trends.
